t.t-value: 'archive post-type-archive post-type-archive-product wp-embed-responsive theme-farmart woocommerce-shop woocommerce woocommerce-page woocommerce-js header-v1 hfeed sidebar-content fm-preloader fm-show-qty woocommerce-active catalog-view-grid fm-catalog-page catalog-nav-numeric-short catalog-standard catalog-sidebar-content catalog-ajax-filter farmart-not-login elementor-default elementor-kit-13 dokan-theme-farmart' if layout_mode == 'grid' else 'archive post-type-archive post-type-archive-product wp-embed-responsive theme-farmart woocommerce-shop woocommerce woocommerce-page woocommerce-js header-v1 hfeed sidebar-content fm-preloader fm-show-qty woocommerce-active catalog-view-list fm-catalog-page catalog-nav-numeric-short catalog-standard catalog-sidebar-content catalog-ajax-filter farmart-not-login elementor-default elementor-kit-13 dokan-theme-farmart'

Sort by price: high to low

t.t-value: [sort for sort in website_sale_sortable if sort[1]==request.params.get('order', '')]

table.class: table table-bordered table-hover text-center mt16 table-comparator

div.class: product type-product post-2332 status-publish first instock product_cat-water product_cat-milks-and-dairies product_cat-bouncers product_cat-nursery product_cat-pushchairs product_cat-toys has-post-thumbnail shipping-taxable purchasable product-type-simple

div.span: Rated 4.00 out of 5 based on 1 customer rating

div.class: yith-wcwl-add-to-wishlist add-to-wishlist-2332 exists wishlist-fragment on-first-load o_add_wishlist
div.data-fragment-options: {"base_url":"","in_default_wishlist":true,"is_single":false,"show_exists":false,"product_id":2332,"parent_product_id":2332,"product_type":"simple","show_view":false,"browse_wishlist_text":"Browse wishlist","already_in_wishslist_text":"The product is already in your wishlist!","product_added_text":"Product added!","heading_icon":"fa-heart-o","available_multi_wishlist":false,"disable_wishlist":false,"show_count":false,"ajax_loading":false,"loop_position":"after_add_to_cart","item":"add_to_wishlist"}

div.span: The product is already in your wishlist!
